title: subworkflow - aws list ssm command invocations
description:
Subworkflow to list SSM command executions and their invocation status across instances

This subworkflow retrieves status of commands sent to EC2 instances through Systems Manager.

Parameters:

commandId: (Required) The SSM command ID to check status for
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Returns command invocation status and results per instance
guide:
## 📋 **Subworkflow to List SSM Command Invocations**

✅ This subworkflow lists the execution status of SSM commands across multiple instances.

Provides per-instance invocation status and command output for verification and troubleshooting.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **commandId** (Required): 🆔 SSM command ID to check
- **awsRegion** (Required): 🌍 AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---

### 📊 **Per-Instance Status Information**

✅ **Successful Invocations:**
- Instance ID
- Invocation status (Success, InProgress, Failed)
- Command output
- Execution duration

❌ **Failed Invocations:**
- Failure reason
- Error output
- Exit code

---

### ⏳ **Command Invocation States**

| Status | Meaning | Action |
|--------|---------|--------|
| **Pending** | Awaiting execution | Wait |
| **InProgress** | Running on instance | Wait |
| **Success** | Completed successfully | Verify output |
| **Failed** | Execution failed | Investigate |
| **Cancelled** | Command was cancelled | Check cancellation reason |
| **TimedOut** | Exceeded timeout | Increase timeout or debug |

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Monitoring command execution
- ✅ Troubleshooting command failures
- ✅ Validating remediation success
- ✅ Gathering execution results

---

list-command-invocations.name: list-command-invocations
list-command-invocations.description: List SSM command invocations and status
